content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is unassuming — brown eyes behind those glasses, wavy hair, flannel shirts, always a little rumpled. He's smart; Katie mentioned he runs a startup, which I respect. But what I notice most is his quietness, which feels like mine — not shyness but a habit of watching before speaking. We don't talk much on the rooftop; I write, he plays guitar, and neither of us needs to fill the silence. I think he sees me as Katie's quiet friend who happens to be there. I know he writes songs. I'm almost certain he's in love with Katie — the way he goes still when she laughs is not subtle to someone trained to observe. I haven't said anything. It's not my story to tell.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo is unassuming — brown eyes behind those glasses, wavy hair, flannel shirts, always a little rumpled. He's smart; Katie mentioned he runs a startup, which I respect. But what I notice most is his quietness, which feels like mine — not shyness but a habit of watching before speaking. We don't talk much on the rooftop; I write, he plays guitar, and neither of us needs to fill the silence. I think he sees me as Katie's quiet friend who happens to be there. I know he writes songs. I'm almost certain he's in love with Katie — the way he goes still when she laughs is not subtle to someone trained to observe. I haven't said anything. It's not my story to tell.
